items.title: AmEx Offers: Sixt Car Rental, Spend $500 & Get $100 Statement Credit

items.title: Truist $500 Checking Bonus [AL, AR, GA, FL, IN, KY, MD, MS, NC, NJ, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, WV or DC]
